title: NYCHA — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Housing Authority (NYCHA) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the NYCHA Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/nycha, and the Oracle Siebel Self Service Portal (selfserve.nycha.info). Includes the NYC geography spine and NYCHA's own development-numbering keys (TDS #, EDP #, HUD AMP #).

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine shared across NYCHA datasets — the join keys back to the rest of city government.

communityBoard.description: Community District / Board (Open Data 'COMMUNITY DISTRICT' / 'Community Board').

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area name or code ('NEIGHBORHOOD TABULATION AREA NAME'/'CODE').

communityDistrict.description: Alias of communityBoard for datasets using 'COMMUNITY DISTRICT'.

StateLegislativeDistricts.description: State/federal legislative overlays carried by several NYCHA datasets.

DevelopmentReference.description: A reference to a NYCHA public housing development by its numbering keys.

tds.description: Tenant Data System number ('TDS #') — NYCHA's primary development key.

amp.description: HUD Asset Management Project number ('AMP #' / 'HUD AMP#').
